name: oncall-reaction-4xx
description: Investigation into ~25K bot accounts (T3/T4, member IDs 1.708B-1.725B) making REACTION_CREATE requests on an invalid activity URN (urn:li:activity:7401998949139865600), causing 4xx errors on SAP since Apr 3. Bots evade QCS rate limiting by sending 1 request per member per 2.5h cycle. 49/71 sampled accounts already restricted. Assessing whether to mass restrict remaining accounts.
